name: John Doe
history: Past labor dispute in a previous workplace. Ongoing concerns related to fairness, pay, and authority at work.
intermediate_belief: I must work harder to prove my worth.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't meet expectations, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Overworking and taking on too many responsibilities to avoid feeling inadequate.
situation: Being asked to work beyond regular hours without additional compensation during an ongoing labor dispute.
auto_thought: If I don't do this, I will be seen as incompetent and lose my job.
behavior: Continuing to work extra hours despite personal cost, avoiding confrontation.
